files.patch:
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-# 🎨 pi-format
+# 🎨 pi-formatter
 
 A [pi](https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono/tree/main/packages/coding-agent)
 extension that auto-formats files after every `write` and `edit` tool call.
@@ -10,12 +10,12 @@ formatting is always best-effort.
 ## 📦 Install
 
 ```bash
-pi install npm:pi-format
+pi install npm:pi-formatter
 ```
 
 ## ⚙️ What it does
 
-`pi-format` listens to successful `write` and `edit` tool calls and applies
+`pi-formatter` listens to successful `write` and `edit` tool calls and applies
 best-effort formatting. Formatter failures never block tool results.
 
 Supported file types:

@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
-id: pi-format
-name: Pi Format
+id: pi-formatter
+name: Pi Formatter
 description: >-
   Language-agnostic formatting hooks for Pi write/edit operations.
-repository: tenzir/pi-format
+repository: tenzir/pi-formatter

@@ -18,5 +18,5 @@ JavaScript/TypeScript.
 Install with:
 
 ```
-pi install npm:pi-format
+pi install npm:pi-formatter
 ```

@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 created: 2026-03-03
 title: Auto-formatting for pi tool calls
 intro: >-
-  This release introduces pi-format, a pi extension that automatically formats
+  This release introduces pi-formatter, a pi extension that automatically formats
 
   files after every `write` and `edit` tool call. Supported languages include

@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-This release introduces pi-format, a pi extension that automatically formats files after every `write` and `edit` tool call. Supported languages include C/C++, CMake, Markdown, JSON, Shell, Python, and JavaScript/TypeScript.
+This release introduces pi-formatter, a pi extension that automatically formats files after every `write` and `edit` tool call. Supported languages include C/C++, CMake, Markdown, JSON, Shell, Python, and JavaScript/TypeScript.
 
 ## 🚀 Features
 
@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@ Supported languages: C/C++, CMake, Markdown, JSON, Shell, Python, and JavaScript
 Install with:
 
 ```
-pi install npm:pi-format
+pi install npm:pi-formatter
 ```
 
 *By @mavam and @codex.*

@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+---
+title: Package rename from pi-format to pi-formatter
+type: bugfix
+authors:
+  - mavam
+  - codex
+created: 2026-03-03T15:18:17.316182Z
+---
+
+`pi-format` has been renamed to `pi-formatter` for npm publishing because npm
+rejected `pi-format` as too similar to the existing package `d3-format`.

@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 {
-  "name": "pi-format",
+  "name": "pi-formatter",
   "version": "0.1.0",
   "description": "Pi extension that auto-formats files after write/edit tool calls.",
   "type": "module",
